title: pgstat — Capacity & Trends
description: Kapasite planlamasi: connection, WAL, TPS, query volume, DB boyut.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by d.numbackends) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(w.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, sum(w.period_wal_size_byte) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(w.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select date_trunc('day', w.sample_ts)::date as day, i.display_name as instance, sum(w.period_wal_size_byte) as daily_wal, max(w.wal_directory_size_byte) as wal_dir_max, max(w.wal_file_count) as files_max, max(a.archived_count) as archived, max(a.failed_count) as failed from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk left join fact.pg_archiver_snapshot a on a.instance_pk = w.instance_pk and date_trunc('day', a.sample_ts) = date_trunc('day', w.sample_ts) where $__timeFilter(w.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1 desc

select bucket_start as time, i.display_name as metric, sum(h.calls_sum) as value from agg.pgss_hourly h join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = h.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(h.bucket_start) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select bucket_start as time, i.display_name as metric, sum(h.exec_time_ms_sum) as value from agg.pgss_hourly h join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = h.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(h.bucket_start) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: TPS Trendi (instance toplam)
panels.description: Instance bazında toplam TPS (tüm database'lerin commit+rollback toplamı / saniye).

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, round(sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / greatest(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 1)) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Günlük TPS Tablosu
panels.description: Günlük ortalama TPS — instance bazında tüm DB'lerin toplamı.

targets.rawSql: select date_trunc('day', d.sample_ts)::date as day, i.display_name as instance, sum(d.xact_commit_delta) as commits, sum(d.xact_rollback_delta) as rollbacks, sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta) as total_xact, round(sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / 86400) as avg_tps from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1 desc, i.display_name

panels.title: Database Boyut Trendi (live tuple)
panels.description: Her database'in günlük max live tuple sayısı. Hızla büyüyen DB'leri belirler.

targets.rawSql: with daily as (select date_trunc('day', t.sample_ts)::date as day, i.display_name || ' / ' || coalesce(dbr.datname, '?') as series, max(t.n_live_tup_estimate) as live from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = t.dbid where $__timeFilter(t.sample_ts) and (t.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance)) group by 1, i.display_name, dbr.datname) select day::timestamptz as time, series as metric, sum(live) as value from daily group by 1, series order by 1

panels.title: Kapasite Özeti
panels.description: Mevcut durum: ortalama TPS, toplam bağlantı, günlük WAL üretimi.

targets.rawSql: select 'Ort. TPS (bugün)' as metric, round(sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / greatest(extract(epoch from (max(d.sample_ts) - min(d.sample_ts))), 1)) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d where d.sample_ts >= current_date and (d.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance))
select 'Max Bağlantı (bugün)' as metric, max(d.numbackends) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d where d.sample_ts >= current_date and (d.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance))
select 'WAL Bugün' as metric, sum(w.period_wal_size_byte) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w where w.sample_ts >= current_date and (w.instance_pk in ($instance) or 'All' in ($instance))
